mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, content, record_type, core_question, status, unlock_at, sealed_at, unlocked_at, ai_summary, ai_prompt_result, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `record` ( user_id, title, content, record_type, core_question, status, unlock_at, sealed_at, unlocked_at, ai_summary, ai_prompt_result, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{recordType}, #{coreQuestion}, #{status}, #{unlockAt}, #{sealedAt}, #{unlockedAt}, #{aiSummary}, #{aiPromptResult}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `record` SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, record_type = #{recordType}, core_question = #{coreQuestion}, unlock_at = #{unlockAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM `record` WHERE status = 'SEALED' AND unlock_at IS NOT NULL AND unlock_at <= #{now} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE `record` SET status = 'UNLOCKED', unlocked_at = #{unlockedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SEALED'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `record` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNLOCKED'
